reviews.comment:
Por ahora es del Estado y tiene beneficios. Si se privatiza todo será buscar ganancias, echar gente y optimizar costos. Ya lo viví, no me lo contaron!

(Translated by Google)
For now, it's state-owned and profitable. If it's privatized, it'll all be about profit, laying off workers, and cutting costs. I've been through it myself, I didn't just hear about it!

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Jorge! gracias por calificarnos, saludos y buena semana!

reviews.comment:
Para cargar combustible siempre demoran en cobrar, en cargar. En todo. Halla autos operativos cargar o no. Personal muy lento, poco atento. Espantan a los clientes

(Translated by Google)
When refueling, they always take a long time to charge, to refuel. Everything. There are cars that are working, whether they're refueling or not. Very slow, inattentive staff. They scare customers away.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsLWNyQTl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay un playero que está en los surtidores centrales que las veces que he ido a esa estación está de mal humor atiende de mala gana pelea con el sistema y por supuesto las groserías las escucha toda la gente que está en la estación un desastre sino le gusta el trabajo que le dió la vida no es culpa de los clientes deberían como dice otro comentario jubilarlo y que se monte una verdureria ya no le da la mente para más....

(Translated by Google)
There's an attendant at the central pumps who, every time I've been to that station, is in a bad mood. He serves customers reluctantly, argues with the system, and of course, everyone at the station can hear his rudeness. It's a disaster. If he doesn't like the job life gave him, that's not the customers' fault. As another comment said, they should retire him and send him to open a fruit and vegetable stand. He's clearly not capable of anything more.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Carlos, te pedimos disculpas por el mal momento. Seguiremos trabajando sobre lo que nos contas y esperamos no se repita.  Saludos y buen fin de semana!

Soy habitué del lugar y desde hace 10 años que cargo combustible y la verdad tanto la atención en la playa con en el minimercado es excelente.

(Translated by Google)
I am a regular at this place and have been filling up my tank there for 10 years, and the truth is that the service both on the beach and in the minimarket is excellent.
